title: Midfield Collection
description: Ball lobbed across the middle; defender cuts the lane. Defender must be able to collect by running through the ball path — no special catch key or animation confirmation required.

expected_outcomes.description: Defender automatically picks up the ball by moving through its path.

must_not_outcomes.description: Collection requires a button press or a scripted catch animation — violates automatic pickup.

notes: Automatic pickup is non-negotiable (P-950). The key test is that no additional input beyond movement is required.
